regional_cost_note: HVAC engineers in Gisborne typically charge $8,500–$20,000 for a residential ducted system and $150–$420/m² of conditioned space for commercial work. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. HVAC work must comply with NZ Building Code G4 and NZBC F7 — use a licensed installer.
